locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

relations.subject: Plumbeous forest falcon
relations.evidence: The plumbeous forest-falcon (Micrastur plumbeus) is a bird of prey in the family Falconidae only found in the Chocó region in Colombia and Ecuador

relations.subject: Plumbeous forest falcon
relations.evidence: D.|last3=Marks|first3=Jeffrey S.|date=2020-03-04|title=Plumbeous Forest-Falcon (Micrastur plumbeus)|url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/plffal1/cur/introduction|journal=Birds of the World|language=en}} It is currently considered a vulnerable species because of the precarity of its habitat that is threatened by deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Plumbeous forest falcon
relations.evidence: This species has been classified as vulnerable by the IUCN because of habitat loss. Deforestation is touching more territories and the plumbeous forest-falcon's habitat is being destructed
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
